message:
perf(join): Wire projection pushdown to SELECT parsing

Extract column names from SELECT items and pass to addJoinedColumnsFiltered
to skip reading unnecessary columns during JOIN operations. This reduces
I/O for queries that don't need all columns from both tables.

- Add current_select_items field to Executor for projection tracking
- Extract column names from SELECT items in executeJoin
- Handle SELECT * by disabling pushdown (need all columns)
- Pass needed_cols to addJoinedColumnsFiltered for both sides

Benchmark: LanceQL 361-374K rows/sec vs Polars 388-390K rows/sec (~5-7% gap)
